addServer.title: Add Server
addServer.subtitle: Track a new Minecraft server's live player count and uptime.
addServer.detailsSubtitle: We'll ping the address every 10 minutes to keep stats fresh.

apiTokens.revokeConfirm: Revoke "{name}"? Any client using it will stop working.
apiTokens.title: API tokens
apiTokens.subtitle: Create a token to let an automated client act on your behalf via the API.
apiTokens.copyWarning: Copy this token now — it won't be shown again.
apiTokens.empty: You don't have any API tokens yet.

myServers.title: My Servers
myServers.subtitle: Servers you own and track live stats for.
myServers.emptyDescription: Add a server to start tracking its player count.
myServers.dialogDescription: {name} will be removed from your dashboard along with its tracking. This action cannot be undone.

settings.logoutAllConfirm: Log out of all devices? This revokes every active session, including this one.
settings.sessionsRevokedDescription: You have been logged out of every device.
settings.managePasswordSubtitle: Choose a strong password you don't use anywhere else.
settings.dangerDescription: Sign out of every active session, including this one. Use this if you suspect your account has been compromised.
